Title: Drive Up from LA
Description: Hit the road! ~3.5 hours up the 101. Stop in Buellton for coffee at Industrial Eats if needed.

Title: Check In & Settle
Description: Drop bags, get settled, explore the property.

Title: Lunch at Fish Gaucho
Location: Fish Gaucho, 1244 Park St, Paso Robles
Description: Upscale Mexican seafood right on the town square. Great ceviche and margs to kick off the trip.

Title: DAOU Vineyards Tasting
Description: Hilltop winery with incredible 360° views. Known for bold Cabernets. Reserve the Estate tasting.

Title: Tin City Exploration
Location: Tin City, 3100 Limestone Way, Paso Robles
Description: Walk around this funky industrial wine/beer/spirits district. Hit Giornata for Italian-style wines, Tin City Cider, and BarrelHouse Brewing.

Title: Dinner at The Hatch
Description: Rotisserie meats, craft cocktails, lively atmosphere. Great group dinner spot to start the trip right.

Title: Downtown Paso Night Walk
Description: Stroll the square, grab dessert or a nightcap. Check if any live music is happening at The Pour House.

Title: Breakfast at General Store
Description: Coffee, pastries, and breakfast sandwiches. Casual morning fuel.

Title: Justin Vineyards Tasting
Description: Iconic Paso winery. The Isosceles is a must-try. Beautiful grounds.

Title: Lunch at Tin City - Etto Pastificio
Description: Fresh handmade pasta in Tin City. Small menu, everything is great. Get the cacio e pepe.

Title: Sensorio Field of Light
Description: Bruce Munro's massive light installation across rolling hills. Even the daytime walk-through of the grounds is cool. Book timed entry.

Title: Pool / Downtime
Description: Recharge at the pool or just hang. Rest up before a big night.

Title: Dinner at Thomas Hill Organics
Description: Farm-to-table right on the square. Great seasonal menu, solid wine list. Make a reservation.

Title: Drinks at Eleven Twenty-Two
Description: Speakeasy-style cocktail bar. Ring the doorbell to enter. Amazing cocktails and vibe.

Title: Coffee at Spearhead
Description: Excellent local roaster. Grab a cortado or cold brew before the day starts.

Title: Tablas Creek Vineyard
Description: Rhône-style wines, organic/biodynamic farming. One of the best in the region. The Esprit de Tablas is the flagship.

Title: Lunch at Paso Market Walk
Description: Food hall with multiple options — tacos, sushi, burgers, wine bar. Everyone can pick what they want.

Title: Eberle Winery Cave Tour
Description: Free cave tours! Walk through 16,000 sq ft of underground caves, then taste in their hilltop room.

Title: Hike at Cerro San Luis (Madonna Mountain)
Location: Cerro San Luis Natural Reserve, San Luis Obispo
Description: Quick 20-min drive to SLO for a moderate 3.5-mile hike with panoramic views. Great golden hour vibes.

Title: Dinner at Buena Tavola
Location: Buena Tavola, 943 Spring St, Paso Robles
Description: Northern Italian fine dining. One of the best restaurants in Paso. Truffle pasta, handmade gnocchi. This is the splurge dinner.

Title: Live Music Downtown
Description: Check local listings — The Pour House, Libretto, or patio bars on the square usually have Saturday night live music.

Title: Sleep In / Lazy Morning
Description: No alarm. Coffee on the patio. Enjoy the last morning.

Title: Brunch at Kitchenette
Description: Fantastic brunch spot. Chicken and waffles, breakfast burritos. Get there a little early to avoid the wait.

Title: Pack Up & Check Out
Description: Pack up, load the car, last group photos.

Title: Stop in SLO for a Walk
Location: Downtown San Luis Obispo, Higuera St
Description: Quick stop to walk Higuera Street, grab ice cream at Doc Burnstein's, see the Bubblegum Alley.

Title: Drive Home to LA
Description: ~3.5 hours back. Beat Sunday evening traffic by leaving before 3pm if possible.
